rows.label: qev013403_MSG0007
rows.name:
There was a huge noise...
Did you defeat that blatta?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013403_JNK0010
rows.name: Confirm

rows.label: qev013403_SEL0011
rows.name: Tell Sarona the blatta is dead and she can relax.

rows.label: qev013403_JNK0020
rows.name: Caution

rows.label: qev013403_SEL0021
rows.name: Warn Sarona not to get too comfortable.

rows.label: qev013403_MSG0008
rows.name:
Thank goodness... You really are
as skilled as the rumors say.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013403_MSG0009
rows.name:
You're right, this is still their territory.
It wouldn't be strange if anything happened...
Yeah... I'm glad you're a cautious person.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013403_MSG0010
rows.name: ...So, where's Inisae...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013403_MSG0011
rows.name: ...Ah![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013403_MSG0012
rows.name:
...Inisae!! What's wrong?
You're not moving at all...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013403_MSG0013
rows.name:
How do you perform CPR on a Ma-non?
Where is... the heart? Where do
you check a Ma-non's pulse!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013403_MSG0014
rows.name:
Aaaah...! I should have
studied more about aliens...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013403_MSG0015
rows.name:
Hey, open your eyes! We just finally
became friends... Saying goodbye so
soon has to be a lie, right!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013403_MSG0017
rows.name: ...Friends... Are we friends?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013403_MSG0018
rows.name: Ah...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013403_MSG0019
rows.name:
Would you become friends...
with a Ma-non like me?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013403_JNK0030
rows.name: Confirm

rows.label: qev013403_SEL0031
rows.name: Tell Inisae that she and Sarona have been friends for a while now.

rows.label: qev013403_JNK0040
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev013403_SEL0041
rows.name: Tell Inisae that she and Sarona are not friends so much as...kindred spirits.

rows.label: qev013403_MSG0020
rows.name:
...I am happy. I have always
been looking at NLA from inside
the spaceship, admiring it...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013403_MSG0021
rows.name:
I wanted to become friends with the
mysterious people there, who are
cyborgs yet so full of warmth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013403_MSG0022
rows.name:
Kindred spirits...? Is that a
more special word than friends?
Earth has some wonderful words.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013403_MSG0023
rows.name: Inisae! Are you okay!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013403_MSG0024
rows.name:
Ouch... My joints ache, but I
think I will probably be okay.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013403_MSG0025
rows.name:
Thank goodness... Then let's get out of
the cave quickly and treat you. I'll
properly protect you on the way back.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013403_MSG0026
rows.name:
...Ah, [ST:playername ]. Thanks for
helping with everything.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013403_MSG0027
rows.name:
We found the resources sleeping in the mountain,
and we found out there's a native creature nest
here... With this, the survey is complete.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013403_MSG0028
rows.name:
Here is the reward. I didn't
really do much work this time,
so please take it all.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013403_MSG0029
rows.name:
...Are you asking if I'm sure? Well, I
met such a wonderful friend, so that
alone makes this survey a total success![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013403_MSG0030
rows.name:
Well then, we'll be heading back
first. ...Let's go, Inisae.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013403_MSG0031
rows.name:
Yes! Oh right, on the way back I will
teach you the locations of various ores
and medicinal herbs on this mountain.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013403_MSG0032
rows.name:
Fufu, thanks! But let's not
overdo it. First we have to
heal those injuries properly.[ST:wait ]
